name: SOC Response Playbook — Incident e133fb82-2ee5-4a48-9196-3ff06603073a
description:
Okay, here’s an analysis of the security alert:

1.  **SUMMARY:** A port scan was detected originating from a suspicious IP address (10.0.0.99) attempting to discover open ports on the network.

2.  **TECHNIQUE:** T1059 - Command Execution – The attacker is attempting to exploit vulnerabilities to execute commands on the target system.

3.  **ACTION:** QUARANTINE_FILE – Immediately isolate the compromised host by locking all network interfaces.

action--1.name: Alert Ingestion
action--1.description: System received new raw SIEM log
